title: elsholtzia manshurica
intro: Elsholtzia manshurica, also known as Korean mint or Chinese silvergrass, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elsholtzia manshurica include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Elsholtzia manshurica can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
